title: plantago macrorhiza subsp. weldenii
intro: Plantago macrorhiza subsp. weldenii, commonly known as Plantain, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plantago macrorhiza subsp. weldenii include promoting wound healing, reducing swelling, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Plantain include teas, infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
